understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place selectable pieces onto goal tiles (+) in each level. A level was won when every goal tile was simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece. Progressing through all levels would complete the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used pixel coordinates with 3 pixels per cell. CLICK allowed switching control between selectable pieces by specifying their exact pixel position. Movement actions attempted to shift the selected piece in the chosen direction. Walls could block movement, and some objects were pushable, shifting along with the selected piece when pushed. The semantic grid showed P for the currently selected piece, S for other selectables, B for blocks, # for walls, and + for goals.
